creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> Example A

On closer inspection, now: there's a 'pause', which feels buggy. 

Maybe most noticeable when using, for example, the scroll ring around a trackball. 

With constant rotation of the ring, there is interrupted (non-constant) scrolling. 

For around one second, depending on how fast the human input device is kept moving, the scrolled area within the sidebar: 

1. stops moving

2. then restarts movement.
